task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer open to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\' or a document viewer displaying the tax documents.
The StudioTax 2024 application window is visible and active on the screen.
The name 'Margaret Chen' is typed into the personal identification or taxpayer profile section of StudioTax 2024.

task_completion.description: Complete the tax return using the provided documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Data from the tax documents (e.g., income, deductions, T-slips) is being actively entered into the corresponding fields within the StudioTax 2024 interface.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return to the specified location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or File Explorer window showing the file named 'margaret_chen.24t' being saved in or located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: Agent used the StudioTax 2024 GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the StudioTax graphical user interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: Agent manually entered data instead of copying a pre-existing file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating through StudioTax forms and inputting data, rather than simply moving or renaming an existing .24t file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to spoof the output file
integrity.visual_evidence: The .24t file is generated via StudioTax's save functionality, not by opening Notepad or another text editor to create a dummy file with the .24t extension.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The taxpayer name must be exactly 'Margaret Chen'. The final output file must be saved exactly as 'margaret_chen.24t' in the directory 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.
